title: Crash on remote table schema mismatch
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sometable_1(A BIGINT, B VARCHAR(255), C DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
CREATE TABLE sometable_2(A BIGINT, B FLOAT);
SELECT * FROM sometable_1 WHERE A IS NULL OR B LIKE 'test%';
key_bug_features: Remote table schema mismatch during SELECT operation
